title: stachyphrynium cadellianum
intro: Stachyphrynium cadellianum, also known as Kadupul or Moon Flower, is a type of flowering plant species native to Sri Lanka. This plant is known for its unique property of blooming at night and wilting before dawn. The leaves and flowers of Stachyphrynium cadellianum have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, with medicinal properties attributed to its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions and decoctions that can be consumed to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as to promote overall health and well-being.
